title: Bengal Weather Forecast: উত্তরবঙ্গে ভারী বৃষ্টির পূর্বাভাস, দুর্যোগ চলবে দক্ষিণেও - Duranta Barta
article_text:
For Bengali readers in India and beyond, Duranta Barta is a legacy. Still one of the leading print media in India, the publication has become a representative of Bengali culture itself.
            Our digital journey started in 2018 with the launch of DurantbartaDictionaries & Encyclopedias
